description_wiki: Yamaguchi Prefecture (山口県, Yamaguchi-ken) is a prefecture of Japan located in the Chūgoku region of Honshu.
Taiwan, officially the Republic of China (ROC), is a country in East Asia.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.

description: Japanese era from October 1868 to July 1912
bacterial infectious disorder contracted by consumption of food or drink contaminated with Salmonella typhi. This disorder is common in developing countries and can be treated with antibiotics.
description_wiki: Typhoid fever, also known as typhoid, is an orally contracted disease caused by Salmonella enterica serotype Typhi bacteria, also called Salmonella Typhi.

description: people from or residents of Portugal
description_wiki: The Portuguese people (Portuguese: Portugueses – masculine – or Portuguesas) are a Romance-speaking ethnic group and nation indigenous to Portugal, a country that occupies the west side of the Iberian Peninsula in south-west Europe, who share culture, ancestry and language.

description: consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.

description: city in Santa Cruz County, California, United States
description_wiki: Watsonville is a city in Santa Cruz County, California, in the Monterey Bay Area of the Central Coast of California.

aliases: Army of the Greater Japanese Empire
description: ground-based armed forces of Japan, from 1868 to 1945
description_wiki: The Imperial Japanese Army (IJA) was the principal ground force of the Empire of Japan from 1871 to 1945.

description: conflict between the Russian and Japanese empires from 1904 to 1905
description_wiki: The Russo-Japanese War (8 February 1904 – 5 September 1905) was fought between the Russian Empire and the Empire of Japan over rival imperial ambitions in Manchuria and the Korean Empire.

aliases: Palo Alto Southern Pacific Railroad Depot
description: railway station in Palo Alto, California
description_wiki: Palo Alto station (also called Palo Alto Transit Center) is an intermodal transit center in Palo Alto, California.
Monterey (  MON-tə-RAY; Spanish: Monterrey) is a city on the southern edge of Monterey Bay, on the Central Coast of California.
The Great Depression was a severe global economic downturn from 1929 to 1939.

description: series of international exhibitions initiated in 1851
description_wiki: A world's fair, also known as a universal exhibition, is a large global exhibition designed to showcase the achievements of nations.
World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: detainee camp in Arizona, United States
description_wiki:
The Poston Internment Camp, located in Yuma County (now in La Paz County) in southwestern Arizona, was the largest (in terms of area) of the 10 American concentration camps operated by the War Relocation Authority during World War II.
The site was composed of three separate camps arranged in a chain from north to south, three miles from each other.

Nisei (二世, "second generation") is a Japanese-language term used in countries in North America and South America to specify the ethnically Japanese children born in the new country to Japanese-born immigrants, or Issei.

description: city and county seat of Cook County, and largest city in State of Illinois, United States of America
description_wiki: Chicago is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Illinois and in the Midwestern United States.
